subcodes.first_line: This evanescent servant was gladdened by beholding thy letter. God willing, mayest thou remain forever eloquent in remembrance of the immortal Purpose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خادم فانی بمشاهده کتاب آنجناب مسرور انشاء الله لازال بذکر مقصود بیزوال ناطق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Christian clergy, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @unity; oneness of humanity, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
